interpretation_rules: Use Hammer or hammer as the brand name, not hammer.ad.
Use /about as the strongest person/profile page.
Use /work detail pages as public evidence of finished portfolio pieces.
Do not infer a blog, notes route, process route, lab route, or top-level agents route.
Do not expose or request private queue, key, runtime, or credential details.
